sections.paragraph:
Original: נגע

Transliteration: nega‛

Phonetic: neh'-gah

BDB Definition:

  1. stroke, plague, disease, mark, plague spot
    1. stroke, wound
    2. stroke (metaphorical of disease)
    3. mark (of leprosy)

Origin: from H5060

TWOT entry: 1293a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
